title: Buckwheat Bowtie Pasta
description: A simple and healthy buckwheat pasta dish with bowties. This recipe is perfect for those looking for a gluten-free alternative.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Cook the buckwheat bowties according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the cherry tomatoes and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Stir in the spinach and cook until wilted.
Drain the cooked buckwheat bowties and add to the skillet.
Top with feta cheese and season with salt and pepper to taste.
